linapro-storage-azure.name: Object Storage - Azure Blob
linapro-storage-azure.description: Provides an Azure Blob Storage backend for the host Storage domain capability.

settings.description: Enter your Azure storage account credentials and container below. Enable only one cloud storage plugin at a time. If the configuration is incomplete, object storage operations will fail—the system will not automatically switch to local disk.
settings.accountNameHelp: Azure storage account name used for shared-key authentication.
settings.accountKeyHelp: Azure storage account key. Leave empty to keep the previously saved value.
settings.accountKeyKeepPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the saved key
settings.endpointHelp: Optional custom service endpoint (Azurite, sovereign cloud, or private endpoint). Default is https://{account}.blob.core.windows.net/.
settings.pathPrefixHelp: Optional key prefix applied under the host-scoped object key.
